# Feature PRD Template

## Problem

Describe the product problem this feature solves and why it matters.

## User

Name the primary user or operator affected by the feature.

## Goals

List the outcomes this feature must create.

## Non-Goals

List nearby outcomes this feature intentionally does not cover.

## Stories Or Workflows

Describe the user stories, operator flows, or workflow steps this feature must support.

## Acceptance Criteria

Record verifiable product and behavior criteria.

## Out Of Scope

Record explicit boundaries that must not be implemented in this work.

## Test Or Verification Strategy

Describe the tests, manual checks, or bootstrap gaps needed to verify the feature.

## Decomposition Notes

Record how the PRD should split into slices or chores, including sequencing constraints.
